testcase.classname: announcements integration supports manager CRUD flow for announcements

testcase.classname: announcements integration allows an employee to acknowledge a visible announcement
testcase.name: announcements integration allows an employee to acknowledge a visible announcement

testcase.classname: workflow integration blocks employees from manager-only open shift creation
testcase.name: workflow integration blocks employees from manager-only open shift creation

testcase.classname: workflow integration claims an open shift once and returns a conflict on the second claim
testcase.name: workflow integration claims an open shift once and returns a conflict on the second claim

testcase.classname: workflow integration creates leave and yield requests, then rejects and conflicts approvals correctly
testcase.name: workflow integration creates leave and yield requests, then rejects and conflicts approvals correctly

testcase.name: sync and health integration serves health summary and readiness against the real database

testcase.classname: concurrency integration allows only one employee to claim the same open shift during a race
testcase.name: concurrency integration allows only one employee to claim the same open shift during a race

testcase.classname: concurrency integration lets only one approval decision win when the same request is submitted twice
testcase.name: concurrency integration lets only one approval decision win when the same request is submitted twice

testcase.name: auth integration logs in and resolves /auth/me

testcase.name: backend policy helpers detects schedule overlap conflicts

testcase.name: backend policy helpers detects overnight overlap conflicts on adjacent dates
